headline: Flex and Teradyne Robotics Expand Partnership to Scale Intelligent Automation Across Global Manufacturing
summary: Flex (NASDAQ: FLEX) and Teradyne Robotics are expanding their collaboration to accelerate intelligent automation across global manufacturing. Under the expanded relationship, Flex plays a dual role by deploying Teradyne Robotics solutions within its own production facilities while manufacturing key robotics components that enable scalable automation deployments for Teradyne Robotics customers worldwide.

headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Teradyne (TER) After Its 435% One Year Surge?
summary: If you are wondering whether Teradyne at around US$379.93 still makes sense for your portfolio, you are not alone. The recent share price puts the focus firmly on what you are paying versus what you might be getting. The stock has returned 3.9% over the last 7 days, 30.6% over the last 30 days, 83.0% year to date and 434.9% over the last year. This naturally raises questions about how much future upside or risk is already reflected in the price. Recent coverage has centered on Teradyne's...
